2603.23823.title: Circuit Complexity of Hierarchical Knowledge Tracing and Implications for Log-Precision Transformers
2603.23823.paper_summary: Knowledge tracing models mastery over interconnected concepts, often organized by prerequisites. We analyze hierarchical prerequisite propagation through a circuit-complexity lens to clarify what is provable about transformer-style computation on deep concept hierarchies. Using recent results that log-precision transformers lie in logspace-uniform $\mathsf{TC}^0$, we formalize prerequisite-tree tasks including recursive-majority mastery propagation. Unconditionally, recursive-majority propagation lies in $\mathsf{NC}^1$ via $O(\log n)$-depth bounded-fanin circuits, while separating it from uniform $\mathsf{TC}^0$ would require major progress on open lower bounds. Under a monotonicity restriction, we obtain an unconditional barrier: alternating ALL/ANY prerequisite trees yield a strict depth hierarchy for \emph{monotone} threshold circuits. Empirically, transformer encoders trained on recursive-majority trees converge to permutation-invariant shortcuts; explicit structure alone does not prevent this, but auxiliary supervision on intermediate subtrees elicits structure-dependent computation and achieves near-perfect accuracy at depths 3--4. These findings motivate structure-aware objectives and iterative mechanisms for prerequisite-sensitive knowledge tracing on deep hierarchies.
2603.23823.paper_summary_zh: 知識追蹤模型掌握相互關聯的概念，通常按先決條件組織。我們通過電路複雜度的視角分析層次性先決條件的傳播，以澄清在深層概念層次上關於Transformer風格計算的可證性。利用最近的結果，對數精度Transformer位於對數空間均勻的 $\mathsf{TC}^0$ 中，我們正式化了先決條件樹任務，包括遞歸多數掌握傳播。在無條件的情況下，遞歸多數傳播位於 $\mathsf{NC}^1$，通過 $O(\log n)$ 深度有界風扇電路，而將其與均勻的 $\mathsf{TC}^0$ 分開則需要在開放的下界上取得重大進展。在單調性限制下，我們獲得了一個無條件的障礙：交替的 ALL/ANY 先決條件樹為 \emph{單調} 閾值電路產生了嚴格的深度層次。經驗上，訓練於遞歸多數樹的Transformer編碼器收斂到置換不變的捷徑；僅僅明確的結構並不能防止這一點，但對中間子樹的輔助監督引發了結構依賴的計算，並在深度 3--4 時達到近乎完美的準確性。這些發現激勵了對結構敏感的目標和迭代機制，以進行深層層次上的先決條件敏感知識追蹤。
2603.23823.author: Naiming Liu et.al.
2603.23823.authors: Naiming Liu, Richard Baraniuk, Shashank Sonkar
